title: tenants — broadcast channels
description: Real-time broadcast channels this module owns. Registered by `TenancyServiceProvider::registerBroadcastChannels()`. Authorization callbacks live on the Broadcast facade and are declared here so a channel change stays discoverable. Uses Laravel Reverb / Pusher over Sanctum-authenticated WebSockets.

channels.name: tenant.{tenantId}.lifecycle
channels.description: Fires on every tenant lifecycle event (suspended, resumed, archived, branding-updated). SPA subscribes on session boot; the shell toasts the change.
channels.authorize: User belongs to the tenant AND has the `tenants.view` permission

channels.name: tenant.{tenantId}.domain
channels.description: Domain-verification progress. SPA subscribes on the Domain show screen; watches for verified / failed transitions to switch the state without polling.
channels.authorize: User belongs to the tenant AND has `tenants.manage_domains`

channels.name: tenant.{tenantId}.branding
channels.description: Branding profile changes. Powers the branding editor's live preview + auto-refresh of the tenant shell theme.

channels.name: tenant.{tenantId}.integration
channels.description: SSO / SCIM / HRIS sync events. Powers the integration status screen (v2).
channels.authorize: User belongs to the tenant AND has `tenants.manage_integrations`
